# <Scope> tasks

How to add tasks: append a checklist item under the right theme. Keep one line per task; link to the doc or ADR that owns the detail.

## <Theme>

- [ ] Task description — [context](./related-doc.md)
- [ ] Another task

## Done

- [x] Completed task
